title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
